Maria Full of Grace (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $6,529,624Details
International Box Office $7,911,534
Worldwide Box Office $14,441,158
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$139,066 (2.1% of total gross)
Legs:12.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$3,200,000 (worldwide box office is 4.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:7 opening theaters/127 max. theaters, 12.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $12,575,569

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 16th, 2004 (Limited) by New Line
International Releases: March 25th, 2005 (Wide), released as Maria Full Of Grace (Australia)
Video Release: December 7th, 2004 by HBO Home Video
MPA Rating: R
Running Time: 101 minutes
Plot point: Accidental Death, Boss From Hell, Death of a Sibling, Drug Cartels, Drug Overdose, Narcotics, Smuggler
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Crime Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: Spanish, English
